emptyState.title: Catch issues before your users do
emptyState.description: We'll scan your traces every day and flag anything worth your attention — tool loops, hallucinations, slow retrievals.
emptyState.turnOnDiagnosticsDescription: Works best with 100+ traces from the past 7 days.

diagnosticsSettings.title: Diagnostics settings
diagnosticsSettings.dailyDiagnosticsDescription: Turn off to pause automated diagnostics. You can reactivate at any time.

turnOnDiagnostic.title: Turn on daily diagnostic?
turnOnDiagnostic.description: First diagnostic runs now. Then every day at {{time}} — we'll review your traces and flag issues to fix. Runs on your Ollie tokens. Turn off anytime.

runFailure.outOfCredits: You're out of LLM credits. Add credits and try again.
runFailure.rateLimited: The LLM provider is rate-limiting requests — try again shortly.
runFailure.providerErrorDescription: The LLM provider returned an error mid-run. This is usually temporary — try again.
runFailure.didNotStartDescription: The run was never picked up (the service may have been restarting). Try again.
runFailure.permissionDeniedDescription: Agent Insights is missing the workspace permission needed to read this project's data. Contact your workspace admin.
runFailure.internalErrorDescription: An unexpected error stopped the run. Try again; if it keeps failing, contact support.
runFailure.defaultErrorDescription: Something went wrong while running diagnostics — try again.

issues.runningDescription: We’re analyzing your traces to detect issues. Results will update automatically — you can leave this page.
issues.detailSubtitle: You’ll see a summary, affected traces, and Ollie’s suggested fix.
issues.issueDetailsPlaceholder: Your issue details will appear here
issues.nothingResolvedDescription: Issues you resolve will show up here. You can reopen them anytime.
issues.allClearDescription: Run a new diagnostic to check for anything new.

staleBanner.title: Results might be outdated
staleBanner.lastRan_one: Last diagnostic ran over {{days}} day ago.
staleBanner.lastRan_other: Last diagnostic ran over {{days}} days ago.
staleBanner.analyze_one: Run a new one to analyze {{traceCount}} trace from the last 24 hours.
staleBanner.analyze_other: Run a new one to analyze {{traceCount}} traces from the last 24 hours.

retentionBanner.nowToKeepMonitoring: now to keep monitoring running smoothly.
retentionBanner.hitPlanLimitsAskAdmin: You've hit your plan limits. To keep monitoring running, ask your organization
retentionBanner.at80Percent: You're at 80% of your {{limit}} free spans. Upgrade to ensure
